# anthropic_service_accounts (Data Source)

Lists service accounts in the org. Requires OAuth Bearer auth.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_service_accounts" "developers" {
  organization_role = "developer"
  include_archived  = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `include_archived` (Boolean)
- `organization_role` (String)

### Read-Only

- `service_accounts` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--service_accounts))

<a id="nestedatt--service_accounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `service_accounts`

Read-Only:

- `archived_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization_role` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
